item.title: Grey Aliens and Artificial Intelligence: The Battle Between Natural and Synthetic Beings for the Human Soul
item.description: In this episode, Danielle Silverman and Dr. John Biger delve into Nigel Kerner’s book, analyzing the terrifying plan they believe the Grey Aliens are executing. Get his book Grey Aliens and Artificial Intelligence: The Battle Between Natural and Synthetic Beings for the Human Soul on Amazon. 🔮 Unlock The Vault!Become a ⭐️ Mysterian ⭐️ and get instant access to hundreds of ad-free, uncensored episodes — plus exclusive bonus editions..🎧 Start your FREE 7-day trial on Patreon: 👉 patreon... item.title: DFB-Auswahl siegt bei Freundschaftsspiel Deutschland - Finnland
item.description: Hofmeister, Philip www.deutschlandfunk.de, Das war der Tag Feed: https://www.deutschlandfunk.de/das-war-der-tag-112.xml
